reviews.comment:
El lugar está muy limpio y cuidado. El playero no se limitó solo a cargar combustible sino que se ofrece para revisar los niveles de agua y aceite. Además me cambio el limpiaparabrisas sin cargo

(Translated by Google)
The place is very clean and well-maintained. The beach attendant not only filled the tank with gas, but also offered to check the water and oil levels. He also changed my windshield wipers for free.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLb1BTbVBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención, muy amables todo el personal de playa , no puedo decir lo mismo del full shop, desastre la atención

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, all the beach staff were very friendly. I can't say the same about the full shop, the service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MzR6RVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Demoraron en atenderme. Los empleados desprolijos . Nunca un ACA tan mal atendido.

(Translated by Google)
